Replay camera vendor. Supplies 4MP varifocal turret cameras (white and black housings) and matching junction boxes used in the PodPlay replay system.

Products are Dahua OEM. Camera model is a varifocal turret with IR, powered via PoE. Sourced for court-level replay recording, one camera per court.
